---
id: set-asset-links
title: "Add asset links to a single alarm"
description: "Adds links between assets and one existing alarm."
sidebar_label: "Add asset links to a single alarm"
hide_title: true
hide_table_of_contents: true
api: 
sidebar_class_name: "put api-method"
info_path: docs/rest-api/openremote-manager-http-api
custom_edit_url: null
---

import MethodEndpoint from "@theme/ApiExplorer/MethodEndpoint";
import ParamsDetails from "@theme/ParamsDetails";
import RequestSchema from "@theme/RequestSchema";
import StatusCodes from "@theme/StatusCodes";
import OperationTabs from "@theme/OperationTabs";
import TabItem from "@theme/TabItem";
import Heading from "@theme/Heading";

<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"Add asset links to a single alarm"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"put"}
  path={"/alarm/assets"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Adds links between assets and one existing alarm.

The request body is a list for backward compatibility, but this operation now has single-alarm semantics:
every item must contain the same `id.realm` and the same `id.alarmId`. The alarm must exist in that realm,
every asset must exist in the same realm, and the authenticated user must have access to that realm.

Existing links are left unchanged; duplicate links in the request or links that already exist are ignored.
This operation does not remove existing links from the alarm.


<Heading
  id={"request"}
  as={"h2"}
  className={"openapi-tabs__heading"}
  children={"Request"}
>
</Heading>

<ParamsDetails
  parameters={[{"name":"Authorization","in":"header","schema":{"type":"string"}},{"name":"X-Forwarded-Proto","in":"header","schema":{"type":"string"}},{"name":"X-Forwarded-Host","in":"header","schema":{"type":"string"}}]}
>
  
</ParamsDetails>

<RequestSchema
  title={"Body"}
  body={{"description":"Alarm asset links to add. All items must use the same `id.realm` and `id.alarmId`.","content":{"application/json":{"schema":{"type":"array","items":{"type":"object","properties":{"id":{"type":"object","properties":{"realm":{"type":"string"},"userId":{"type":"string"},"assetId":{"type":"string"}},"title":"Id"},"createdOn":{"type":"string","format":"date-time"},"assetName":{"type":"string"},"parentAssetName":{"type":"string"}},"title":"AlarmAssetLink"}},"examples":{"Single asset link":{"summary":"Link one asset to one alarm","description":"Single asset link","value":[{"id":{"realm":"building","alarmId":1234,"assetId":"7A6p4AnLTkKxJUCQAAABAA"}}]},"Multiple asset links":{"summary":"Link multiple assets to the same alarm","description":"Multiple asset links","value":[{"id":{"realm":"building","alarmId":1234,"assetId":"7A6p4AnLTkKxJUCQAAABAA"}},{"id":{"realm":"building","alarmId":1234,"assetId":"2Qjr4AnLTkKxJUCQAAACAA"}}]},"Invalid multiple alarms":{"summary":"Rejected because the request targets more than one alarm","description":"Invalid multiple alarms","value":[{"id":{"realm":"building","alarmId":1234,"assetId":"7A6p4AnLTkKxJUCQAAABAA"}},{"id":{"realm":"building","alarmId":5678,"assetId":"2Qjr4AnLTkKxJUCQAAACAA"}}]}}}},"required":true}}
>
  
</RequestSchema>

<StatusCodes
  id={undefined}
  label={undefined}
  responses={{"204":{"description":"Asset links were added, or already existed"},"400":{"description":"Invalid request body, multiple alarm IDs or realms were provided, or the alarm/assets are not all in the same realm"},"401":{"description":"Authentication is required"},"403":{"description":"The authenticated user is not allowed to write alarms in the requested realm"},"404":{"description":"The alarm or one or more assets do not exist"}}}
>
  
</StatusCodes>
